message:
bd-1q5.17: E2E test for inline mode scrollback preservation

10 tests covering the full inline mode lifecycle:
- Write 100 lines then render inline widget
- Scrollback accessible above widget after render
- Scrollback intact after widget removal (RAII drop)
- Multiple interleaved render passes preserve scrollback
- Full lifecycle: write → render → more writes → re-render → cleanup
- InlineAuto mode preserves scrollback
- Widget gauge tracks lifecycle transitions
- Full caps (sync output) inline mode
- Resize between renders preserves scrollback
- into_inner returns writer with scrollback intact

All tests verify: no alternate screen sequences (CSI ?1049h/l),
cursor save/restore brackets UI render, all log lines survive.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
